subject: Morale concern: {player}
body:
Coach, we've noticed that {player}'s morale has dropped significantly. Currently at {morale}%.

This could affect their performance in matches and training. It might be worth having a word with them to understand what's going on.

es.subject: Preocupación por la moral: {player}
es.body:
Jefe, hemos notado que la moral de {player} ha bajado significativamente. Actualmente en {morale}%.

Esto podría afectar su rendimiento en partidos y entrenamientos. Podría valer la pena hablar con él para entender qué sucede.
